大穴の中を、荷車にウェンディを乗せたベリサとヴィーラが進む。<br>道は険しく、:
Verisa and Viera press onward through the Abyss with Wendy riding in
the cart. The path is treacherous, sweat beads on both their foreheads.
こ、こんなの、ぜんぜんヨユーだしぃ～っ。<br>ウェンディは余計な気を回さずに寝:
Th-this is totally a breeze~ okay~?
Wendy should just lie down and stop worrying about us~.
そうですよっ。わたしとお姉ちゃん、<br>姉妹の愛の力を合わせれば、１００万馬力:
That's right! When Onee-chan and I
combine our sisterly love, we've got a million horsepower...!
そんなことより、結晶のところまではまだかかるんだから、<br>ウェンディこそ頑張:
More importantly, it's still a ways to the crystal;
so you're the one who needs to hang in there~ okay~?
（ふたりとも、平気なわけないのに……<br>わたしを気遣ってくれてるんだ……）:
(There's no way they're fine...
They're just trying to keep me from worrying...)
（……励まされてばっかりじゃダメだ。<br>わたしも、ふたりのために何かできたら:
(...I can't just keep being the one who gets encouraged.
If only there were something I could do for them...)
ふぅ……ヴィーラ、今どのあたり～？: Phew... Viera, where are we now~?
アーデルハイトさんにいただいた地図によれば……半分は来てるね。: According to the map Adelheid gave us... we're about halfway there.
なんだ、思ったより大したことないじゃん♪<br>ウェンディ、あとちょっとの辛抱だ:
Huh, that's not as bad as I thought♪
Just hang tight a little longer; Wendy~.
はい……ありがとうございます、ベリサさん、ヴィーラさん。<br>……おふたりとも:
Yes... thank you; Verisa; Viera.
...Are you both sure you don't need to rest?
できればそうしたいところですが、このあたりの深さだと危険も多くなって<br>くる:
I'd like to, but at this depth the dangers should be getting worse.
Pushing through all at once might actually be safer.
そうね～。大穴の中は、何が襲ってくるか分からないしぃ……: Yeah~. You never know what might attack us down here in the Abyss...
その時、ガサガサという不快な音が<br>３人の鼓膜を揺らした。:
Just then, an unpleasant rustling sound
reaches the ears of all three.
――ッ！ 言ってるそばから、おいでなさったかぁ。<br>ふたりとも気をつけて！:
--! Speak of the devil, here they come.
Both of you, watch out! Something's hiding in those bushes!
うん、お姉ちゃん！<br>……あれ？ こんなところに、茂み……？:
Got it; Onee-chan!
...Wait? Bushes... in a place like this...?
待ってください！ 身体は動きませんが、<br>魔導センサーを稼働させれれば……！:
Wait! My body can't move, but
if I can get my magic sensors running...!
――これはっ！？<br>ふたりとも、離れてくださいっ！:
--This is...!?
Both of you, get away from it!
なっ……これって、茂みに隠れてるんじゃなくて……: Wha... it's not hiding in the bushes...
直後――茂みから飛び出した無数の茨が、<br>蛇のように伸びて３人を襲う！:
The next instant--countless thorned vines burst from the thicket;
snaking outward to strike at all three!
こんなもの、あたしの炎で焼き払ってやる～～！<br>ハァァァァァ！:
These things are nothing my fire can't burn away~~!
Haaaaaaah!
飛びかかってくる茨にベリサの炎魔法が直撃する。<br>茨は燃え上がると勢いを失く:
Verisa's fire magic scores a direct hit on the lunging vines.
They ignite and lose their momentum, crumbling away into ash.
や～い、ざ～こざ～こ、ざこ植物ぅ～。<br>ベリサちゃんの力、その目に焼きつけな:
Nyeh~ helpless~ little~ weakling plants~. Burn the power of
Verisa-chan into your eyes... oh wait, you don't have any~.
これは大穴の影響で変容した植物ですね。<br>データによると、獲物を捕らえて魔力:
These are plants that mutated from the Abyss's influence. According
to my data, they have a habit of capturing prey and draining their mana.
ふぅ～ん。<br>モンスターじゃなくてただの植物なら、炎に弱いってことぉ？:
Hmm~.
So if they're just plants and not monsters, they're weak to fire?
はい。ただ冷気には強い耐性があるようなので、<br>そこには注意が必要かも……:
Yes. However, they seem to have strong resistance to cold;
so that's something to be careful of...
なるほど……！ <br>流石はウェンディさん！ 頼りになります！:
I see...!
That's Wendy for you! So reliable!
ほんと、いいサポーターじゃ～ん♪ まあとにかく、<br>天才魔法使いのベリサちゃ:
Seriously, what a great support~♪ Well, anyway; with the genius mage
Verisa-chan here, the rest'll be a piece of cake♪
（よかった……体を動かすことはできないけど、<br>おふたりの役に立つことはでき:
(Good... I can't move my body;
but I can still be useful to them. I'll keep scanning for enemies--)
あ……！<br>あの、おふたりとも……見てください……！:
Ah...!
Um, you two... look at that...!
ん～？ 何よ、ウェンディ。<br>おばけ植物だったらあたしが焼き尽くして……:
Hm~? What is it; Wendy?
If it's more ghost plants I'll just burn them all--
ウェンディの指さす先を見たベリサとヴィーラが、ぎょっと目を見開く。<br>そこに:
Verisa and Viera look where Wendy is pointing and their eyes go wide.
There--over a hundred thorned vines rear up like serpents poised to strike.
こ、これはさすがに……: Th-this is a bit much even for us...
ヴィ、ヴィーラ！！ 氷の壁でウェンディを守りなさい！！: V-Viera!! Shield Wendy with an ice wall!!
動けないウェンディを狙った茨が、<br>ヴィーラの作り出した氷の防壁に阻まれる。:
The vines targeting the immobile Wendy
slam into the ice barrier Viera conjures.
よしっ、そのまま防いでなさい！<br>あとはあたしが……全部焼き払ってあげる～～:
Good, keep holding them off!
Leave the rest to me... I'll burn every last one~~!!
はぁ、はぁ、はぁ……！ こいつら、どんだけいるのよぉ～！？<br>ざこなくせに、:
Hah, hah, hah...! How many of these things are there~!?
They're just weaklings, but there's so many of them~~!
茨はベリサの魔法で片っ端から焼き払われるが、あまりにも数が多い。<br>ベリサの:
The vines are burned away one after another by Verisa's magic, but
there are simply too many. Exhaustion gradually shows on Verisa's face.
こっちも数が多くて、これ以上は……！: There are too many on this side too; I can't hold much longer...!
ヴィーラも氷の防壁で応戦しているが、<br>全方位から襲いかかる茨の波状攻撃を防:
Viera fights back with ice barriers of her own; but she has her hands
full fending off the relentless waves of vines from all directions.
（どうしよう……このままじゃ、ふたりが――！<br>前線基地の誰かに、信号を送っ:
(What do I do... at this rate, they'll both--!
If I could send a signal to someone at the base for help--!)
（でも、誰に……？ 司令官もいないのに……。<br>わたしには、ベリサさんとヴィ:
(But who would I call...? The Commander isn't here...
I don't have any friends I can rely on besides Verisa and Viera...)
っ、もう……追い、つかない……！<br>このままじゃ魔力が……っ！:
Ngh; I... can't keep up...!
At this rate my mana will...!
お姉ちゃんっ！<br>っ、やっぱり氷じゃ効果が薄い……！:
Onee-chan!
Ngh, my ice really isn't effective enough...!
ウェンディの願いに、凛とした声が応える。直後、疾風のごとき勢いで<br>飛び込ん:
A clear, resolute voice answers Wendy's plea. The next instant,
someone charges in like a gale and mows down a mass of vines in one sweep.
危ないところだったな。<br>だが、アタシが来たからには、もう大丈夫だ！:
That was a close one.
But now that I'm here, you've got nothing to worry about!
アーデルハイトに事情を聞き、急いで追ってきたんだ。<br>ウェンディには、訓練に:
I heard the situation from Adelheid and rushed after you.
Wendy helped me with my training, after all.
……え？ それだけのことで……助けてくれるんですか？: ...Huh? Just for something like that... you came to help us?
ふむ。そう言われてみれば、もうひとつ理由があったな。: Hmm. Now that you mention it, there is one more reason.
アンタが司令官の兄さんのために頑張ってると聞いた。<br>そんなアンタを、アタシ:
I heard you've been working hard for the Commander.
I took a liking to you for that. That's reason enough.
まったく、かっこつけちゃってぇ……どれだけタイミングいいのよ。<br>でも、来た:
Jeez, showing off like that... talk about perfect timing.
But since you're here, you'd better pull your weight~ okay~?
もちろんだ。<br>ここはこちらに任せて、ふたりは休むといい。:
Of course.
Leave this to us and take a rest, you two.
休むって……ひとりでこれだけの茨をさばくつもりですかっ？: Rest...? You're planning to handle all these vines by yourself?
よ～～し！ やっと追いついたぞ！: All ri~~ght! I finally caught up!
おっと……これはいきなり、大変な状況だね。: Whoa... we walked right into a mess, didn't we.
ウェンディちゃんが大変だって聞いてね！<br>援護に来たよ！:
We heard Wendy was in trouble!
So we came as backup!
お世話になった恩を返すのは、当然のことですからねー！<br>ホノカちゃん、私たち:
Repaying a debt of gratitude is only natural!
Honoka, while we hold the vines off with Raveria!
まっかせてくれ！ さあっ、手早く改造しちゃうぞぉ～～！: Leave it to me! C'mon, let's get this thing modded up real quick~~!
道具を手にしたホノカが荷車に駆け寄り、<br>何やら細工を始める。:
Tools in hand; Honoka rushes over to the cart
and starts tinkering with it.
改造してるんだぞ！ あたしがこの荷車を、ゴゴォ～～～ってなって、<br>バッビュ:
I'm modding it! I'm gonna make this cart go VROOOOM~~~ and then
WHOOOOSH~~~~ and BRRRRRRM~~~~!
さっぱり分かりません！<br>どなたか通訳をお願いします……！:
I have absolutely no idea what that means!
Could someone please translate...!
えっと……速く動けるようにしてくれるのでしょうか……？<br>すごくありがたいん:
Um... I think she's making it go faster...?
I really appreciate it, but... why go this far?
この前、一緒に鍛冶をしてくれて楽しかったからな！<br>一緒にいて楽しいなら、友:
We had so much fun smithing together the other day! If it's fun being
together, that makes us friends! Friends help each other out~!
よし、こっちはある程度数を減らしたぞ！<br>今なら突破できる！:
Right, we've thinned their numbers enough over here!
Now's your chance to break through!
こんなところに横道が……知らなかったぁ。: There's a side passage here... I had no idea.
ここを通れば一気に目的地まで辿り着けますー！<br>私たちは引き続き、ラヴェリア:
Take this path and you'll reach the destination in no time!
We'll keep drawing the vines' attention with Raveria!
ありがとうございます！ どうか、ご武運を！: Thank you so much! Please, stay safe!
あんたたちも必ず、パーティーに参加しなさいよねぇ～！: You'd all better come to the party too, got it~!
こっちも改造が終わったぞ！<br>さあさあ、ベリサとヴィーラも荷車に乗って！ 一:
My mods are done over here too!
Come on; Verisa and Viera, get on the cart! We're going all at once!
乗るのはいいけど、どうするってのよぉ？: Getting on is fine and all, but what exactly is this gonna do~?
ホノカが改造した荷車の仕掛けを発動する。直後、荷車後部に取りつけられた<br>筒:
Honoka triggers the contraption on the cart. A tube on the back
erupts in flame, and the cart rockets into the side passage at full speed--!
あばばばばばばばばばっ……！<br>こ、こんなに速いんなら先に言いなさいよぉ～～:
Abababababababa...!
I-if it was gonna be this fast you should've warned us~~~...!
あははは……これならあっという間だね。: Ahahaha... at this speed we'll be there in no time.
それにしても……ウェンディさんは、みんなから好かれていますね。: Even so... everyone really does like you; Wendy.
そうね～。もう友だちはあたしたちだけじゃない感じかぁ。<br>ふふ、人気者じゃな:
Yeah~. Looks like we're not your only friends anymore.
Hehe, quite the popular girl, aren't you; Wendy♪
